# Local Changes to sd-scripts

This document lists all modifications made to the upstream [kohya-ss/sd-scripts](https://github.com/kohya-ss/sd-scripts) code.

## Policy

**Do NOT add new modifications.** The sd-scripts code must stay as close to upstream as possible. Our Web UI passes parameters to these scripts — it does NOT patch them.

## Current Modifications

**None.** This directory is an unmodified copy of upstream [kohya-ss/sd-scripts](https://github.com/kohya-ss/sd-scripts).

If you find differences, they should be reverted unless explicitly approved and documented here.
